channel.title: MBallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from MBallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump Says He’ll Do ‘Right Thing’ In Iran No Matter The Polls. Let’s See The Same Approach To Deportations
item.description: The mass deportation of illegal immigrants is every bit as righteous and 'the right thing' to do as Trump claims bombing Iran is.

item.title: Why Operation Epic Fury Is Catastrophic for Xi
item.description: The U.S.–Israeli military campaign has created palpable problems for China.

item.title: ‘We Are Just Getting Started’: Hegseth Signals Prolonged U.S. Commitment In Iran
item.description: Questions that remains unanswered are who will take control of Iran after all of its potential leaders or successors are dead, as Hegseth said? What w...

item.title: SCOTUS Rules That Courts Should Defer To Immigration Judges On Asylum Cases
item.description: The U.S. Supreme Court unanimously sided with the Trump administration on Wednesday in a dispute over the standard for reviewing the cases of illegal ...

item.title: Battle for Texas Senate seat hinges on Republican runoff and a Trump endorsement
item.description: The fate of a U.S. Senate seat in Texas likely rests on a May 26 GOP runoff between four-term Republican incumbent John Cornyn and the state's ultra-c...

item.title: Texas Rep. Julie Johnson and Colin Allred advance to runoff in Democratic primary for U.S. House
item.description: Texas Rep. Julie Johnson and former Rep. Colin Allred have advanced to runoff in a Democratic primary for U.S. House.

item.title: Congress Had Plenty of Opportunities to Stop the Iran Strikes
item.description: Despite what his congressional critics say, Trump’s actions in Iran are in line with the Framers’ views of presidential power.

item.title: Ella McCay — Hollywood’s Definitive Disaster
item.description: James L. Brooks loses his sense of humor to politics.

item.title: California Told Us to Deceive Parents, but We Said No
item.description: Teachers shouldn’t be forced to lie to parents about their child’s asserted gender identity.

item.title: What's next for embattled Rep. Tony Gonzales after being forced into runoff?
item.description: Rep. Tony Gonzales survived Tuesday's GOP primary -- but just barely. Now, with a runoff looming, a congressional ethics investigation underway and mo...

item.title: Early voting on Virginia's new congressional map gets green light as judge rejects challenge
item.description: Early voting on Virginia's congressional redistricting referendum will begin Friday after a judge dismissed a lawsuit that sought to delay the vote ov...

item.title: IRS leader Bisignano declines to answer questions over unlawful taxpayer data disclosures to ICE
item.description: The head of the IRS largely declined to answer questions about recent unlawful disclosures of taxpayer data when he was questioned by lawmakers at a c...

item.title: The Hurdles to Democracy in Iran
item.description: And how to potentially overcome them.

item.title: For Media, The Only Good Christian Is A Fake One Like James Talarico
item.description: When Democrats conceal radical left-wing ideology in Christian language, media celebrate it as a savvy communications strategy and describe it as 'hea...

item.title: The Texas Primaries Just Ended A Bunch of Jerry Springer Episodes
item.description: The primary elections in Texas this week may bring us closer to the daily heartburn of a Sen. James Talarico, endlessly sermonizing on the biblical ma...
